title: Break and Continue 🛑
description: Take full control over your loops by skipping or escaping them.

slides.title: The Emergency Exit 🚪

quizData.question: What is the primary function of the `break` keyword inside a loop?

options.text: It pauses the loop for 5 seconds.
It completely exits and terminates the loop.
It doubles the speed of the loop.

quizData.explanation: The `break` keyword stops the loop unconditionally right then and there.

slides.title: Skipping Your Turn ⏭️

quizData.question: Which keyword is used to skip the rest of the current loop iteration, but keep the loop running?
quizData.explanation: The `continue` keyword stops the *current* cycle and forces the loop to move on to the next one immediately.

slides.title: See It in Action
slides.content: Run this code and see perfectly how `break` and `continue` change how the numbers print.
